phrases.en: I took out some paper to write to my friend.
phrases.zh: 我拿出一些纸给朋友写信。

phrases.en: I wrote the date and a greeting at the top.
phrases.zh: 我在顶部写了日期和称呼。

phrases.en: I apologized for not writing sooner.
phrases.zh: 我为没有早点写信道歉。

phrases.en: And I wrote about what I'd been doing.
phrases.zh: 我还写了我最近在做什么。

phrases.en: As I wrote, I re-read her last letter to me.
phrases.zh: 写信时，我重读了她上次给我的信。

phrases.en: I answered questions she had asked.
phrases.zh: 我回答了她问过的问题。

phrases.en: And I asked her about herself.
